scripts.dev: concurrently -n spfx,api -c blue,green "npm run spfx:serve" "npm run api:start"
scripts.db:migrate: cd api && dotnet ef database update --project src/WissensHub.Infrastructure --startup-project src/WissensHub.Functions
scripts.test:backend: cd api && dotnet test tests/WissensHub.Tests -e AZURE_FUNCTIONS_ENVIRONMENT=Development
scripts.test:all: npm run test:frontend && npm run test:backend
